item.title: Version Control System
item.author: 作者
item.description: Data Model The following pseudo code can explain the git data model clearly. Firstly, we will talk about the three models in git. // a file is a set of data type blob = array<byte> // a directory which concludes files and directories type tree = map<string, tree | blob> // every commit concludes a parent, metadata and top tree type commit = struct { parent: array<commit> author: string message:
